name: fortls-lsp
description: Fortran language server (fortls) for Claude Code — wires fortls into the built-in LSP tool to give code intelligence (go-to-definition, find-references, symbol search, hover, diagnostics) across free-form and fixed-form Fortran sources. Covers free-form .f90/.F90/.f95/.f03/.f08 and fixed-form .f/.F/.for/.f77/.fpp. Requires `fortls` on PATH (pip install fortls).
